metaDescription: Track collectibles worldwide before prices move.
headline: Track collectibles worldwide before prices move.
subheadline: One app for Funko Pop, LEGO, anime figures, action figures, premium statues and more. Spot momentum, stock pressure and collectible opportunities earlier.
ctaMicro: Be first to access the global launch.
errorText: Please enter a valid email address.
successText: Saved locally. Connect this button to your email tool when ready.
card1text: Collectors lose time checking too many sites, too many drops and too many price moves. Collector Radar is designed to centralize the signal.
card2text: Funko Pop, LEGO, anime figures, action figures, Hot Toys, premium statues and limited collectible releases across major markets.
card3text: You join before launch, help shape the first release and get the lowest launch price when the app goes live.
footerText: Concept validation page • international positioning • language-selectable main experience
